system.Text:
__When you check to see if you have a specific helpful item or resource__, and you have at least +1 supply, roll +supply.

On a __strong hit__, you have it, and are ready to act. Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you have it, but your resources are diminished. Take +1 momentum and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

On a __miss__, you don't have it and the situation grows more perilous. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you check to see if you have a specific helpful item or resource...

Strong Hit.Text: On a __strong hit__, you have it, and are ready to act. Take +1 momentum.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, you have it, but your resources are diminished. Take +1 momentum and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1).

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, you don't have it and the situation grows more perilous. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
